groups.strategy: Retrieve public tagged PDF and PDF/UA examples.

groups.strategy: Combine public samples with generated custom encodings.
groups.why: Tests ToUnicode and fallback confidence.

groups.strategy: Combine public samples with generated qpdf variants.
groups.why: Covers xref tables, xref streams, and object streams.

groups.strategy: Retrieve public samples or generate with qpdf --linearize.
groups.why: Tests hint tables and streamed loading assumptions.

groups.strategy: Generate append-only PDF edits.
groups.why: Tests newest object resolution.

groups.strategy: Generate encrypted fixtures with known passwords.
groups.why: Tests password handling without bypassing encryption.

groups.strategy: Mutate known-good fixtures reproducibly.
groups.why: Tests repair mode and structured errors.

groups.strategy: Retrieve public-domain scans or generate page-image PDFs.
groups.why: Tests raster path and OCR routing.

groups.strategy: Retrieve public OCR PDFs or generate OCR overlays.
groups.why: Tests hidden text and OCR reconciliation.

groups.strategy: Mutate OCR layer positions or text.
groups.why: Tests distrust of bad hidden text.

groups.strategy: Retrieve open manuals over 500 pages, with one over 1000 pages if practical.
groups.why: Tests streaming, repeated headers, and memory behavior.

groups.strategy: Retrieve open papers with columns, formulas, and references.
groups.why: Tests reading order, equations, and captions.

groups.strategy: Combine generated tables with public financial or government tables.
groups.why: Tests ruling-line table extraction.

candidates.licenseName: Public web PDF, redistribution pending review

groups.strategy: Combine generated tables with public reports.
groups.why: Tests whitespace and alignment inference.

groups.strategy: Generate span and nested-header table cases.
groups.why: Tests HTML fallback and CSV sidecars.

groups.strategy: Retrieve public forms with fields and check boxes.
groups.why: Tests AcroForm and field-value extraction.

candidates.licenseName: IRS.gov official form, local-only until redistribution review
candidates.licenseNotes: IRS.gov content has restrictions around official seal, names, and symbols; use locally until reviewed.
candidates.notes: Official IRS W-9 form candidate for AcroForm, check box, and government-form extraction.

groups.strategy: Generate fixtures and retrieve permissive samples.
groups.why: Tests dense key-value layout.

groups.strategy: Retrieve public-domain decks and brochures or generate fixtures.
groups.why: Tests arbitrary visual order and warnings.

groups.strategy: Combine public-domain vector-heavy samples with generated charts.
groups.why: Tests asset preservation and avoids hallucinated semantics.

groups.strategy: Generate LaTeX pages and retrieve open papers.
groups.why: Tests Unicode and LaTeX equation fallback.

groups.strategy: Retrieve or generate Arabic and Hebrew PDFs.
groups.why: Tests direction-aware grouping.

groups.strategy: Retrieve or generate Chinese, Japanese, and Korean PDFs.
groups.why: Tests CID fonts and line grouping.

groups.strategy: Retrieve or generate Japanese vertical text PDFs.
groups.why: Tests writing mode handling.

groups.strategy: Generate rotated and cropped transformations.
groups.why: Tests coordinate normalization.

groups.strategy: Generate stress fixtures with tiny fonts and huge images.
groups.why: Tests caps, scaling, and OCR behavior.

groups.strategy: Combine generated annotations with public annotated PDFs.
groups.why: Tests link and comment extraction.

groups.strategy: Generate embedded-file PDFs.
groups.why: Tests sidecar metadata extraction.

groups.strategy: Retrieve public signed samples or generate signed fixtures.
groups.why: Tests metadata reporting without validation claims.

groups.strategy: Retrieve public samples if license permits; otherwise keep local-only.
groups.why: Tests explicit unsupported or fallback behavior.
